trivia_bullets.text: Leonin Scimitar was printed in Mirrodin (released October 2, 2003), the set that introduced the Equipment mechanic to Magic. MRD lead designer Mark Rosewater described Equipment as solving the long-standing design problem of how a creature could wield a weapon that persists after its death -- unlike Auras, Equipment stays on the battlefield when its bearer is destroyed.
sources: MTG Wiki: Equipment, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrated by Doug Chaffee, who passed away in 2011. A CoolStuffInc retrospective by Vorthos Mike notes Chaffee specialized in equipment and object portraiture with dynamic composition, citing Leonin Scimitar as an example of his strength in that genre.

The Leonin are the lion-people of Mirrodin's Razor Fields; their specialist craftspeople called 'edgewrights' forged the weapons of the leonin warrior caste, placing a scimitar with leonine motifs directly in that craft tradition.
sources: MTG Salvation Forums: 'Origins of the Races of Mirrodin', via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Has been reprinted 5 times beyond the Mirrodin original: Tenth Edition (2007), Salvat 2011, Jumpstart 2022, and Foundations Jumpstart (2024) -- one of the most frequently reprinted common Equipments from the original Mirrodin block.

EDHREC lists Leonin Scimitar in roughly 1,590 Commander decks at 0.02% inclusion, primarily under Kemba Kha Regent and Sram Senior Edificer. Legal in Pauper. Considered a budget filler slot even in dedicated equipment strategies.
sources: EDHREC: Leonin Scimitar card page, via WebSearch snippet

related_cards.name: Kemba, Kha Regent
related_cards.note: Top Equipment commander on EDHREC; also Leonin, tying racial lore to the card

related_cards.name: Sram, Senior Edificer
related_cards.note: Other dominant Equipment commander; frequently runs Leonin Scimitar as cheap equip trigger

related_cards.name: Leonin Shikari
related_cards.note: Same set, same race; allows equipping at instant speed, direct synergy

related_cards.name: Puresteel Paladin
related_cards.note: Definitive Equipment-chain enabler; Leonin Scimitar is a free-equip trigger with metalcraft active

flags.color_magic_tag_note: Card is colorless (artifact) -- colorless-magic is in tags_filter which is correct per BBL convention
